ddls:
CREATE TABLE "deals" (
  "deal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deal */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the deal */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the deal is applicable */,
  "family_edition" INTEGER /* Indicates if the deal is a family edition */,
  "value" REAL /* Original price of the deal */,
  "you_save" REAL /* Amount saved on the deal */,
  "discount_pct" REAL /* Percentage discount of the deal */,
  "num_sold" INTEGER /* Number of deals sold */,
  "sold_out" INTEGER /* Indicates if the deal is sold out */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date when the deal started */,
  "weekday_start" TEXT /* Day of the week when the deal starts */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the deal in days */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the deal */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the deal has received */,
  "deal_image" TEXT /* Image of the deal */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the deal */,
  "deal_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the deal */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the deal */,
  "original_price_before_discount" REAL /* Original price before discount */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the deal is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deals_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Health, Retail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* Image of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "deal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deal purchased */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount paid for the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "voucher_code" TEXT /* Voucher code used for the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_deal_id FOREIGN KEY ("deal_id") REFERENCES deals ("deal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlist" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the deal */,
  "deal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deal added to the wishlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the deal was added to the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlist_deal_id FOREIGN KEY ("deal_id") REFERENCES deals ("deal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "deal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deal being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when feedback was left */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_deal_id FOREIGN KEY ("deal_id") REFERENCES deals ("deal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "deal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deal associated with the analytics data */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the deal */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the deal */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics were recorded */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the deal */,
  "CTR" REAL /* Click-through rate (CTR) of the deal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_deal_id FOREIGN KEY ("deal_id") REFERENCES deals ("deal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deal_tags" (
  "deal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deal associated with the tag */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the deal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deal_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "deal_images" (
  "deal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deal associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deal_id", "image_url")
)
